case_title: THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC., A CORP. vs. CULICH, JOHN JOSEPH, ET AL.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC., A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CULICH, JOHN JOSEPH, ET AL.
